steps.title: Translate the percentage statement to an equation
steps.content:
The phrase 5% of $w$ is 901.32 means we multiply $w$ by the decimal equivalent of 5%.

$$0.05w = 901.32$$

steps.title: Solve for w by dividing
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.05:

$$w = \frac{901.32}{0.05}$$

To divide by 0.05, multiply by its reciprocal, 20:

$$w = 901.32 \times 20 = 18,026.4$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
